subcodes.first_line: God willing, ye have ever quaffed, and shall continue to quaff, from the Kawthar of divine bounty, and abide within the precincts of His mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله لم یزل و لایزال از کوثر فضل الهی بیاشامید و در جوار رحمتش ساکن و
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
